SQL> create table jtab (id int,name varchar2(20),info CLOB CONSTRAINT ensure_json CHECK (info IS JSON)); 表已创建。

SQL>select \*from jtab; IDNAME INFO 1 xuexiaogang {"tel":"13712345678","QQ":"123456","Base":"shanghai"} 2 xuexiaogang2 {"tel":"13012345678","QQ":"123456","地点":"北京"} 3 xuexiaogang3 {"tel":"13012345678","SEX":"男","职业":"数据库"}   
SQL>select id,name,t.info tel from jtab t; ID NAME TEL 1 xuexiaogang 13712345678 2 xuexiaogang2 13012345678 3 xuexiaogang3 13012345678
